root.sql: select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.membership_no , tab.seq_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( select decode(lag(sc_mem_m_member_memo.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_member_memo.membership_no , sc_mem_m_member_memo.seq_no ) ,sc_mem_m_member_memo.membership_no ,0,1 ) as row_memno , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_mem_m_member_memo.membership_no , sc_mem_m_member_memo.seq_no , sc_mem_m_member_memo.memo_detail , sc_mem_m_member_memo.drop_emer , sc_mem_m_member_memo.drop_norm , sc_mem_m_member_memo.drop_spec , sc_mem_m_member_memo.drop_coll , sc_mem_m_member_memo.lon_restruc , sc_mem_m_member_memo.entry_date , sc_mem_m_member_memo.entry_id , sc_mem_m_ucf_memo.memo_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_memo.memo_desc from sc_mem_m_member_memo , sc_mem_m_ucf_memo , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_member_memo.memo_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_memo.memo_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_memo.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code and to_date(sc_mem_m_member_memo.entry_date) between '!entry_date_1!' and '!entry_date_2!' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_member_memo.membership_no = '023808' --and sc_mem_m_member_memo.entry_date between '01/08/2023' and '31/08/2023' order by sc_mem_m_member_memo.membership_no , sc_mem_m_member_memo.seq_no ) tab
